name: SavvyCal
price_basis: advertised Basic plan billed annually, checked 2026-07
verdict_reason: KILL: a friendlier booking page is still a booking page. One route on your Zo.
what_zo_builds: One booking route with the parts SavvyCal is loved for: ranked availability instead of a wall of slots, and your preferred times shown first. The route reads Google Calendar free/busy, scores slots against preferences in a small config file, and books straight onto the calendar with a confirmation to both sides.
dont_kill_if: You lean on team scheduling links or meeting polls shared across several people's calendars. More than one calendar owner is a KEEP wall.
build_brief: Goal: replace SavvyCal with a booking route on you. Connect my Google Calendar. Create a route at /book that reads free/busy for the next 14 days and presents slots ranked by my preferences: mornings first, nothing after 4pm, 15 minute buffers between meetings. Let the visitor upload or paste their own calendar file to overlay mutual free times. On submit, write the event with the visitor as guest and email us both. Done when a stranger books a ranked slot and it lands on my calendar with the buffer respected.
